query: when is the paschal candle lit in church
seed_doc: deacon also carries a special Paschal candle which is a single large candle whenever he leads an ektenia (litany) or censes. Paschal candle A Paschal candle is a large, white candle used in liturgies in Western Christianity (viz., the Roman Catholic Church, the Anglican Communion, and Lutheran churches, among others). A new Paschal candle is blessed and lit April 8, and is used throughout the Paschal season which is during Easter and then throughout the year on special occasions, such as baptisms and funerals.
